<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and facing right (`>`). The next cell to the right (row 02 column C) contains lava (`L`), which I must avoid. I should turn down to proceed safely towards the goal at row 04 column D. To turn from right to down, I will rotate clockwise.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B and I am facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward will take me to a lava cell at row 03 column B, which is deadly. I need to avoid lava. Turning right to face left `<` or left to face right `>` would allow me to move safely toward the goal. From facing down to facing right `>`, I need to turn counter-clockwise once.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell in front (row 02 column C) is lava (`L`), so moving forward is not safe. To avoid the lava, I will turn clockwise to face down (`v`) and then move forward towards row 03 column B, which is safe.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 03 column B, which is a safe floor cell. Continuing forward seems the best option to avoid lava at column C. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 03 column B, facing down (`v`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. The immediate cell in front (row 04 column B) is floor (`.`), so I can move forward safely. However, moving straight down will put me further from the goal located to the right. I should consider moving right eventually, but first I will move forward to advance and then adjust orientation.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 05 column B, which is a wall `#`. I need to go right to reach the goal, so I should turn left (counter-clockwise) to face right (`>`).
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B facing right (`>`). The goal is at cell row 04 column D. The cell directly in front of me (row 04, column C) is safe (floor `.`), so I can move forward once to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am currently at row 04 column C, facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D, directly in front of me. The cell ahead is floor with the goal, so it is safe to move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
